About the author

Follow authors to get new release updates, plus improved recommendations.

J. R. R. Tolkien

Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

J.R.R. Tolkien was born on 3rd January 1892. After serving in the First World War, he became best known for The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings, selling 150 million copies in more than 40 languages worldwide. Awarded the CBE and an honorary Doctorate of Letters from Oxford University, he died in 1973 at the age of 81.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

  • Lynette A.
    5.0 out of 5 stars Perfect collector's book.
    Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 2 January 2019
    Verified Purchase
    Bought for my husband who loves Tolkien. Well made with good illustrations. As he is a collector this book replaces his old one which he must have ready about 8 times.

See more reviews

Top reviews from other countries

  • PHENN
    5.0 out of 5 stars Quality binding and cover and print.
    Reviewed in Canada on 9 January 2020
    Verified Purchase
    Great price and replaced my paper backs with the ink that soaks into blotchy letters in the news print paper.
    Glad they cared to publish such a high quality bound hardcover. Do consider though.... don’t expect giant maps... just better ones on foldout that really do give a better lay of the land. But do expect crisp paper, clear text, accented with colour throughout. Glad I found a copy.
    Read more
    Report
  • B. Emerick
    3.0 out of 5 stars Bent copy, not a good gift
    Reviewed in the United States on 25 November 2021
    Verified Purchase
    My copy was bent in half. Every page is creased. There is no way to flatten this out, even after being under stacks of books for days. It’s going to be annoying to read, and I can’t gift it as intended.
    Read more
    Report
  • Emily May
    5.0 out of 5 stars Great buy
    Reviewed in the United States on 7 May 2021
    Verified Purchase
    It was in great condition and arrived very quickly.
    Read more
    Report
  • Laurie Eutsler
    2.0 out of 5 stars I bought a new book that is damaged.
    Reviewed in the United States on 6 June 2025
    Verified Purchase
    I received the book earlier than expected.
    It is a Father’s Day gift for my husband. I was disappointed to see that the cover is very creased and bent, the crease goes 600 pages into the book. I bought the book new, and it feels like I received a used book to give as a present. Very disappointed.
    Read more
